code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  let text = match line
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let p = parts.get(i)
    match p
    when Some(s)
      match string.parse_int(s)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut sorted = true
  mut j = 1
  while j < nums.len()
    let a = nums.get(j - 1)
    let b = nums.get(j)
    match a
    when Some(av)
      match b
      when Some(bv)
        if av > bv
          sorted = false
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
